series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with contracts and leases entered into with concessionaires for the operation of State Park Concession facilities, and includes but is not limited to: contracts; leases; bid documents, including proposals and evaluations, requests for proposals (RFPs); price approval forms; profit and loss statements; expenditures from the maintenance, repair and replacement funds; concessions facility inspection reports; general correspondence; and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after expiration or termination of contract/lease/RFP. If paper records are scanned and saved in an electronic format the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after expiration or termination of contract/lease/RFP, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
